title: Junior Investment Banker at Groww Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Groww Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Groww Capital India! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Groww Capital India:
Groww Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
